required_inputs.role: Respondent-item retest file validated against schema/wave_response.schema.json before paired analyses that evaluate repeatability of the existing citable v0.3.1 somatic_ambient_anxiety score.
required_inputs.validation_rule: All rows must use wave_id anx_us_2026w03_somatic_retest, event_id no_event, baseline_or_followup followup, and exactly the four v0.2.0 item IDs.

required_inputs.role: Respondent-level paired file containing Wave 1 scores, retest scores, linkage status, timing windows, QC flags, conditioning variables, and attrition weights.
required_inputs.validation_rule: Primary paired analyses must fail closed unless each retained pair has unique linkage, 13 to before 16 day timing, four valid Wave 1 item scores, and four valid retest item scores.

required_inputs.role: Frozen variable definitions for linkage fields, timing-window fields, exclusion flags, panel-conditioning variables, weights, and JSONL mapping.
required_inputs.validation_rule: Analysis scripts must reject recoded, absent, or renamed linkage, timing, conditioning, exclusion, and weight variables unless a dated preregistration addendum exists.

required_inputs.role: Frozen v0.3.1 scored item wording, response anchors, scoring keys, and construct metadata for the four retested items.
required_inputs.validation_rule: The analysis allowlist is exactly the four item IDs and v0.2.0 item versions named in the v0.3.1 manifest and retest preregistration.

packages.name: irr
packages.purpose: Two-way absolute-agreement intraclass correlation estimates for the paired construct score.

packages.name: boot
packages.purpose: Respondent-resampling bootstrap intervals for ICC and sensitivity estimates.

packages.name: survey
packages.purpose: Attrition-adjusted weighted means, robust standard errors, agreement summaries, and weight trimming checks.

packages.name: psych
packages.purpose: Polychoric or Spearman item stability correlations and descriptive psychometric summaries.

packages.name: lavaan
packages.purpose: Ordered-categorical longitudinal CFA and measurement-invariance models using WLSMV.

packages.name: semTools
packages.purpose: Longitudinal invariance helpers and fit-index comparison tables.

software_environment.version_lock_rule: Analyses must archive sessionInfo output and package versions exactly; any package substitution requires an addendum showing unchanged confirmatory pass-fail decisions.

randomization_and_seeds.seed_policy: Seeds are fixed before outcome inspection and must be set immediately before stochastic procedures, then written to the retest evidence report.

sample_splits.overlap_rule: Each primary pair must link exactly one eligible anx_us_2026w02_somatic respondent to exactly one complete primary-window retest record.

eligibility_rules.rule: Respondent passed Wave 1 exclusions, completed all four approved somatic items, gave recontact permission, and has a protected linkage token.
Retest completion is at least 13 completed days and less than 16 completed days after Wave 1 completion.

exclusion_rules.rule: Exclude retest records without informed consent or with failed United States adult English self-administration confirmation.
Exclude records without a unique one-to-one protected linkage between a Wave 1 analytic record and a retest record.

Exclude respondents failing the retest attention check, scenario-comprehension check, somatic-attribution check, speed check, duplicate check, vendor quality review, or self-reported understanding check.
Exclude respondents from primary construct analyses if any of the four retest ANX item responses is missing, refused, non-substantive, or outside the 1 to 5 scale.

non_exclusion_flags.rule: Self-reported memory of the prior survey is retained for sensitivity analysis and does not exclude respondents from the primary estimate by itself.

weighting_policy.primary_estimation: The primary ICC is unweighted; weighted mean change and descriptive estimates use attrition-adjusted Wave 1 weights.
weighting_policy.descriptive_estimation: Reports must show both unweighted psychometric diagnostics and attrition-adjusted weighted descriptive estimates.
weighting_policy.weight_construction: The primary weight equals the final Wave 1 post-stratification weight multiplied by inverse predicted retest completion propensity, trimmed and rescaled to the complete-pair analytic sample size.

trimming.exception_rule: Weights outside 0.30 to 3.00 require trimming; any exception requires an addendum showing unchanged repeatability decisions.

missing_data_handling.item_distributions: Missing retest item responses are reported by item and by eligibility stage before primary paired exclusions.
missing_data_handling.factor_models: Longitudinal CFA uses complete paired responses to all four Wave 1 and retest items; no outcome imputation is permitted.
missing_data_handling.reliability: Construct-level ICC requires complete valid Wave 1 and retest scores for all four items; incomplete retests are not imputed.
missing_data_handling.irt: IRT-style linking is fallback only for invariance if CFA is unstable; it uses observed paired item responses with no imputed item scores.
missing_data_handling.external_validity: No external-validity endpoint is confirmatory in this retest; attrition covariate missingness may use explicit missing categories or missing indicators.
missing_data_handling.imputation_policy: Do not impute ANX item responses or construct scores; covariate handling for attrition models must be documented before model fitting.

efa.estimator: Not run as confirmatory retest endpoint; one-factor structure is inherited from v0.3.1.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Document that no exploratory factor claim is made.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Stop if exploratory factor results are used as confirmatory evidence.

cfa.estimator: Ordered-categorical longitudinal CFA using WLSMV or a documented ordinal equivalent.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Proceed to metric and scalar invariance tests.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label longitudinal_invariance_failed_configural and prohibit construct reliability claims.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Scalar or threshold invariance CFI threshold passes.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label weighted mean change as measurement-non-invariant.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Scalar or threshold invariance RMSEA threshold passes.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label weighted mean change as measurement-non-invariant.

omega.estimator: Retest repeatability is evaluated with ICC rather than internal-consistency omega.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Construct repeatability ICC lower confidence bound passes.

irt.estimator: Fallback ordinal item-response or alignment-based linking only if longitudinal CFA is unidentified or unstable.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Item parameter drift is small enough for mean-score interpretation.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label partial or failed longitudinal invariance.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Repeated same-item residual dependence remains below review threshold.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Flag repeated-administration local dependence for reviewer decision.

dif.estimator: Attrition comparison using standardized mean differences and weighted percentage-point differences.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Attrition construct difference in score points stays within threshold.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label repeatability evidence attrition-sensitive unless weighted decision still passes.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Attrition construct difference in standard deviation units stays within threshold.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Label repeatability evidence attrition-sensitive unless weighted decision still passes.

invariance.estimator: Decision synthesis from longitudinal CFA, fallback linking, and residual local-dependence checks.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Permit construct-level ICC and weighted mean-change interpretation within the retest scope.
pass_fail_thresholds.fail_action: Apply the preregistered longitudinal-invariance failure label.

external_validity.estimator: No external-validity claim is tested; panel-conditioning and item-stability checks provide retest validity safeguards.

pass_fail_thresholds.pass_action: Conditioning-excluded ICC remains above sensitivity threshold.
Conditioning exclusion does not materially change mean change.

validation_gates.pass_action: Permit confirmatory repeatability claims if all psychometric gates also pass.
validation_gates.fail_action: If below 400 report descriptively only; otherwise report with sample-size caution.

validation_gates.pass_action: Construct mean change stays within the preregistered negligible-change threshold.
Lower confidence bound stays within equivalence range.
Upper confidence bound stays within equivalence range.
Standardized response mean is within negligible-change threshold.
All items meet the minimum stability-correlation threshold.
validation_gates.fail_action: Apply item-level caution or construct failure according to number of failed items.

validation_gates.pass_action: All items meet the weighted item mean-change threshold.
validation_gates.fail_action: Apply item-level caution or construct failure according to number of failed items.

validation_gates.pass_action: All items keep large category movement within threshold.
validation_gates.fail_action: Apply item-level caution or construct failure according to number of failed items.

validation_gates.pass_action: All items meet the missing or unusable retest response threshold.
validation_gates.fail_action: Apply item-level caution or construct failure according to number of failed items.

sensitivity_analyses.description: Repeat ICC and mean-change endpoints after excluding respondents who remembered the prior item block and changed AI-news attention or avoidance because of it.
sensitivity_analyses.primary_comparison: Label panel-conditioning-sensitive if conditioning-excluded ICC is below 0.65 or weighted mean change shifts by more than 0.10 points.

sensitivity_analyses.description: Repeat core estimates in the broader 10 to before 21 day timing-sensitivity window.
sensitivity_analyses.primary_comparison: Compare direction and pass-fail decisions with the primary 13 to before 16 day retest window.

sensitivity_analyses.description: Compare unweighted and attrition-adjusted weighted estimates and flag bias using preregistered attrition thresholds.
sensitivity_analyses.primary_comparison: Repeatability evidence is attrition-sensitive if construct differences exceed 0.15 points or 0.20 SD and weighted decisions do not preserve the pass classification.

dossier_output.write_policy: Every confirmatory statistic, threshold decision, exclusion count, and sensitivity label in this plan must be written before any public retest evidence claim.

statistic_to_dossier_field.decision_use: Primary construct repeatability estimate must be at least 0.70.
Bootstrap 95 percent confidence interval lower bound must be at least 0.60.
Absolute weighted construct mean change must be no greater than 0.15 points.
Standardized mean differences greater than 0.10 must be flagged in the attrition table.
Conditioning-excluded ICC below 0.65 triggers the panel-conditioning-sensitive label.
Each item must have an unweighted stability correlation of at least 0.50.
Construct-level reliability and mean-change interpretation require longitudinal measurement comparability.
